title: bradautomates/claude-video
friendlyTitle: A tool that lets Claude watch videos
summary: claude-video gives Claude and compatible agent hosts a /watch workflow for analyzing videos by downloading media, extracting representative frames, pulling captions, transcribing audio when needed, and handing the visual and audio evidence to the assistant.
friendlySummary: This repo lets an AI assistant download a video, read captions or transcripts, look at frames, and answer questions about what happened.
whyItMatters: Creators, researchers, marketers, and developers can use it to summarize videos, inspect launch demos, diagnose screen-recorded bugs, or turn courses and interviews into searchable notes. It is a practical pattern for giving agents grounded video understanding without relying only on titles or descriptions.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It can help summarize videos, study demos, review courses, or understand screen recordings of bugs.
howItsUseful: Creators, researchers, marketers, and developers can use it to summarize videos, inspect launch demos, diagnose screen-recorded bugs, or turn courses and interviews into searchable notes. It is a practical pattern for giving agents grounded video understanding without relying only on titles or descriptions.
